_mode: great_hall: fully dynamic GI, no baked lightmap (stealth-dark).
_probes: offline probe_bake: coarse 13.5m/2 levels -> ~1.7k probes: air at 4.5m, near-geometry 4.5m bricks at 1.5m spacing. Adaptive = FEWER probes than the old 1024-lattice look, spent near geometry.
_transport: gi_grid_cell sets the gather solid-angle scale (cellsq/d^2): 4m flat-plateaued+7x-overweighted distant bright sources (banner red teleporting across the hall); 1.5 = actual fine probe spacing. gi_samples 2048 >= source count -> deterministic full scan, no per-probe subset variance.
_fireflies: per-ray radiance clamp: 32 uniform probe rays credit a hit with 4pi/32 sr, so the fire-lit red banner seen from across the hall (~0.01 sr) was ~40x over-weighted on whichever probes happened to hit it -> stable saturated blotches. Clamp bounds any single ray; 6.0 keeps sunlit-stone bounce.
